evidence_direction_note: [2026-05-08 governance reclassification] Reclassified SD-049 + SD-015 weakens -> non_contributory. Pre-MECH-307 affect-stream architecture mixed harm and benefit surprise into a single VALENCE_SURPRISE channel. Phase-2 reef behavioural validation depends on cleanly separated affect signals to drive discriminative learning of resource-vs-harm encoding; with the streams mixed, classifier-loss and probe-accuracy targets cannot be interpreted as testing what the experiment intended. MECH-229 + MECH-230 already non_contributory. Re-test required after MECH-307 conjunction-fix substrate lands.
